title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 95.465 - Mayor and two houses of legislation defined (cities over 100,000)
text:
95.465.  Mayor and two houses of legislation defined (cities over 100,000). — In sections 95.465 to 95.500, the word "mayor" shall include the chief magistrate in every such city, and the words "two houses of legislation" shall include the municipal assembly and the common council of every city having such a body of government.
(RSMo 1939 § 7583) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7440; 1919 § 8848; 1909 § 9697
